runParameters.timingNormalizationNote: Both sides run repeat=50 dispatches per sample via the kernel_dispatch command repeat field. Divisors are symmetric at 1.0; per-dispatch timing is implicit in the repeat count.

workload.comparabilityNotes: Doe dispatches pre-compiled MSL zero-init kernel; Dawn routes through Tint->MSL. Same workgroup memory access pattern on both sides.
workload.description: Compute workload aligned to Dawn VulkanZeroInitializeWorkgroupMemoryExtensionTest workgroupSize=256 variant.
workload.name: zero-initialize workgroup memory (256)
